description_long: This is a large, contemporary three-seat sofa upholstered in a rich, dark brown leather material. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear plush and well-padded for comfort. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, modern silhouette. The upholstery has a smooth, glossy finish that reflects light, highlighting the luxurious leather texture. The base of the sofa is fully enclosed, with no visible legs, contributing to its solid and grounded appearance. This piece would be suitable for upscale urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or stylish residential interiors.
description: A large, dark brown leather sofa with three plush seat and back cushions, broad straight armrests, and a glossy, modern finish. The base is fully enclosed, giving it a solid, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three individual seat and back cushions, broad armrests, and the glossy leather surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth leather back and the enclosed base with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth, emphasizing the sofa's boxy profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size and likely loose but fitted closely together.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, modern profile and fully padded leather upholstery.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully enclosed, giving the appearance of a solid, grounded structure.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-high backrest with three segmented, plush cushions matching the seat cushions in size and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather with a smooth, glossy finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
